mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for equity valuations, directly compressing forward S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC for FEDFUNDS levels exceeds +0.05 over a 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are positive in >65% of rate increase periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden spike in the unemployment rate above 4.5% signals immediate labor market deterioration, triggering rapid equity sell-offs within the following week.
failure_condition: S&P 500 5-day forward returns remain positive in >55% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 4.5%, or the signal shows zero predictive power in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates robust aggregate demand, which drives corporate earnings growth and positive equity returns over one month.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative 20-day returns in >60% of triggered cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle reflects supply-side contraction that outweighs demand resilience, leading to negative quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during tightening periods yield positive 60-day returns in >50% of cases, or the regime filter fails to improve out-of-sample Sharpe ratio.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls provides a stable foundation for consumer spending and corporate revenue, generating consistently positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth correlates negatively with 20-day forward returns over a 5-year sample, or the signal hit rate falls below 45% in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Headline inflation index exceeding 255 forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, causing immediate short-term equity drawdowns within the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of periods following CPIAUCSL breaches above 255, or the threshold shows no edge in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real GDP combined with falling unemployment creates a synchronized macroeconomic expansion that boosts corporate profit margins and drives positive quarterly equity performance.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative 60-day returns in >55% of occurrences, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero in panel regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production rebounds strongly during post-shock recovery phases, signaling restored manufacturing capacity and supply chain normalization that lifts equity valuations over one month.
failure_condition: INDPRO recoveries in post-shock regimes fail to generate positive 20-day returns in >50% of cases, or the regime classification produces no incremental predictive accuracy.
